---
title: "Taha Ziad"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: file-pdf
      text: Resume
      href: resume.pdf
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/taha-ziad
    - icon: headphones
      text: SoundCloud
      href: https://soundcloud.com/ztaha
    - icon: camera
      text: VSCO
      href: https://vsco.co/tahaziad/gallery
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:taha.ziad.business@gmail.com
---

I think the best way to use Machine Learning is to leverage intuition to find elegant solutions. Above is a collection of rather simple projects that illustrate that solutions that are tangible exist for nebulous domains. A lot of what I do is for games, they are easy to get data for and their abstractions make for good analogies to more tangible domains.
